title: sterculia setigera
intro: Sterculia setigera, also known as the Scarswort or Tree of Life, is a plant species native to India and Southeast Asia, belonging to the Malvaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In traditional medicine, Sterculia setigera is often prepared as a decoction or powder, or used in combination with other herbs to create teas, infusions, and topical applications.
